title: 平子果然不會讓我們包蜜失望，鐵拳再砸支那遊戲業
meta_description: 平子果然不會讓我們包蜜失望，鐵拳再砸<mark>支那</mark>遊戲業 - Tencent, NetEase shares plummet on new China online gaming guidelines KEY POINTS Tencent shares tumbled by as much as nearly 15....
meta_keywords: 不會,讓我,們包,失望,鐵拳,再砸,<mark>支那</mark>,遊戲
contents:
Tencent, NetEase shares plummet on new China online gaming guidelines
KEY POINTS
Tencent shares tumbled by as much as nearly 15.7%, while NetEase plunged by as much as 28%
Beijing released draft guidelines aimed at curbing incentives that could lead to excessive gaming and spending.
----------------
絕大多數支那人和平子的觀點一致，覺得只有農業和製造業才算經濟，其他什麼金融，服務全是虛的，消費更是等同於浪費，最好全支那人一天24h除開必要的吃飯睡覺之外，全在流水線上幹活。打遊戲在支那人眼中已經等同於誅九族的大罪了
